meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Finish Apps
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship professional, high-value apps at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates decision fatigue by providing a battle-tested, modular architecture out of the box. By pairing this scaffold with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate generation, force-align project structure, and maintain high velocity, allowing you to focus purely on business logic rather than setup paralysis.
content.intro:
The cursor blinks in an empty IDE—a silent indictment of your productivity. You have the vision, the client's deposit, and the deadline looming, yet the project remains a graveyard of half-baked folders and unconfigured dependencies. This isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of a rigorous, repeatable system.

Professional shipping is about momentum, not motivation. When you adopt the Antigravity project template, you stop reinventing the wheel and start building the engine. By integrating this with Claude Code, you transition from a coder wrestling with syntax to an architect orchestrating high-performance software at scale.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-ready foundation that enforces directory structure and security best practices immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean Antigravity project scaffold with modular routing, environment variable management, and pre-configured database connection pools.

steps.title: Define Schema and Domain Logic
steps.description: Bridge the gap between client requirements and database architecture using AI-assisted schema definitions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a SaaS user management system including roles, subscription tiers, and audit logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate prisma schema based on project requirements"

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Eliminate the manual grind of creating CRUD endpoints by leveraging the template's built-in patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build RESTful API routes for the User model, implementing standard error handling and input validation using Zod.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate crud api routes for user and profile models"

steps.title: Inject Business Logic Service Layer
steps.description: Move logic out of controllers and into dedicated service files to ensure maintainability for future client updates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the authentication logic into a reusable service class that handles JWT validation and session management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create auth service layer with proper dependency injection"

steps.title: Finalize and Deploy
steps.description: Run the final production check to ensure the project meets performance and security standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the project for common security vulnerabilities and optimize build settings for production deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "run security audit and prepare build config"

pro_tips: Always define your project boundaries in a 'README.md' file before coding; Claude Code uses this as a source of truth to avoid feature creep.
Use 'dry-run' flags in your CLI commands to verify file changes before applying them to your production template.
Keep your Antigravity template updated by periodically running a diff against the latest version to capture performance improvements.
Leverage Claude Code's context window by including your 'schema.prisma' file in every prompt to ensure consistent naming conventions.
Automate your testing by asking Claude to generate unit tests for every new service file immediately after creation.
content.next_steps: Once the boilerplate is finished, integrate a CI/CD pipeline to automate your deployment process and start showing your client progress updates every 48 hours.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting unfinished projects destroy your freelance reputation. Adopt the Antigravity workflow today to double your shipping speed and reclaim your time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
